title: Adds Pay by Bank to the Billing API
raw_changelog: Adds Pay by Bank to the Billing API. Affected Products: Billing, Payments. Breaking change: Non-breaking. Category: api. You can now use Pay by Bank as a payment method for billing subscriptions and invoices through the Stripe Billing API.
before_text:
## Billing API - Payment Methods

The Billing API supports the following payment methods for subscriptions:
- Card (Visa, Mastercard, Amex)
- ACH Direct Debit
- SEPA Direct Debit
- Bancontact
- iDEAL

### Creating a Subscription
```
POST /v1/subscriptions
{
  "customer": "cus_xxx",
  "items": [{"price": "price_xxx"}],
  "payment_settings": {
    "payment_method_types": ["card", "us_bank_account", "sepa_debit"]
  }
}
```
after_text:
## Billing API - Payment Methods

The Billing API supports the following payment methods for subscriptions:
- Card (Visa, Mastercard, Amex)
- ACH Direct Debit
- SEPA Direct Debit
- Bancontact
- iDEAL
- Pay by Bank (US)

### Creating a Subscription
```
POST /v1/subscriptions
{
  "customer": "cus_xxx",
  "items": [{"price": "price_xxx"}],
  "payment_settings": {
    "payment_method_types": ["card", "us_bank_account", "sepa_debit", "us_bank_account_pay_by_bank"]
  }
}
```
diff_text:
--- before
+++ after
@@ -6,6 +6,7 @@
 - Bancontact
 - iDEAL
+- Pay by Bank (US)
 
 ### Creating a Subscription
@@ -14,7 +15,7 @@
   "payment_settings": {
-    "payment_method_types": ["card", "us_bank_account", "sepa_debit"]
+    "payment_method_types": ["card", "us_bank_account", "sepa_debit", "us_bank_account_pay_by_bank"]
   }

ground_truth.action_required: No immediate action required. New payment method option available for US customers.
ground_truth.confidence_notes: Clear additive change, new payment method type added to supported list
